calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
William Stein, Esq. (310-556-8861; wstein@ebglaw.com) of Epstein Becker & Green PC for Petitioner.
Ethan Noyer (818-571-0891; ethan.s.noyer@protonmail.com) Respondent in propria persona.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER AEROTEK, INC.'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is taken under submission.

The court has received respondents's proposed order for review. Petitioner also directed to submit a proposed for court's review.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
